name: Timebreaker Magician
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>刻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Each turn, the first Pendulum Monster(s) you control that would be destroyed by an opponent's card effect, is not destroyed.

[ Monster Effect ] 
When this card is Pendulum Summoned from the hand (and no other cards are Pendulum Summoned at the same time): You can make this card's ATK become double its original ATK. Once per turn: You can target 1 monster on the field; banish both it and this card from the field until your next Standby Phase.
pend_eff: Each turn, the first Pendulum Monster(s) you control that would be destroyed by an opponent's card effect, is not destroyed.
mnst_eff: When this card is Pendulum Summoned from the hand (and no other cards are Pendulum Summoned at the same time): You can make this card's ATK become double its original ATK. Once per turn: You can target 1 monster on the field; banish both it and this card from the field until your next Standby Phase.
eff: When this card is Pendulum Summoned from the hand (and no other cards are Pendulum Summoned at the same time): You can make this card's ATK become double its original ATK. Once per turn: You can target 1 monster on the field; banish both it and this card from the field until your next Standby Phase.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
Returns itself to field while banished
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
